name: flight-deals
description: Custom MCP tool for Google Flights: searchFlights returns the cheapest itineraries for a route + dates.

tools.name: searchFlights
tools.description: Searches Google Flights for a route + dates and returns the cheapest itineraries (price, airline, times, stops). `from`/`to` are airports or cities, dates are YYYY-MM-DD. Self-contained: navigates to the Google Flights results page and reads the itinerary list in one call.

tools.name: finish
tools.description: Call when the task is complete. Pass a short result summary; its value is the final result.
